items.title: Buggy issues
items.summary: I don't write reviews often, but this is what I have to say about Morimens. Like a few others, I haven't been able to log onto my account. I only use my iOS account to play. I've purchased some stuff from this game in the past, I'm definitely above the legal age— and yet, I still can't log in. I always get an error on the login screen despite no previous problems in the past. I've tried restarting my device, reinstalling the game. Still the same problem, every time. If one of the devs can reach out to me, I would love that. Or maybe I'll try reaching out myself in the discord. I'm in no immediate rush to play Morimens again, but I do enjoy the game whenever I come back from my gacha hiatuses. But this bug is rly disappointing to deal with, and to see other people going through the same issues makes me not want to play. Restarting a new account doesn't sound appealing to me either. If my issue is fixed, I will change the rating. But for now it will stay at 1 star.
items.author: daydozy
